# configure-self-hosted-supabase
Description: Configure a self-hosted Supabase instance by setting environment variables for its URL and anonymous key.
Source: project
1. Locate your project's environment configuration file (e.g., `.env`).
2. Set the `VITE_SUPABASE_URL` environment variable to the URL of your self-hosted Supabase instance.
3. Set the `VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` environment variable to the anonymous key associated with your self-hosted Supabase instance.
4. Ensure that any provided SQL setup scripts (e.g., `supabase/setup.sql`) are executed on your self-hosted database to establish the required schema.
